description: Critical upcoming dates for LEVER/XMarket across all coverage areas. Consolidated from 24 RESEARCH scans on 2026-03-28/29.

dates.event: Polymarket taker fee expansion (8 new categories)
dates.impact: Geopolitics stays free (good for LEVER oracle). $1M/day revenue. Maker rebates incentivize deeper CLOB (better PI quality).

dates.event: Trump deadline: Iran energy infrastructure strikes OR peace deal (8PM ET Monday)
dates.status: CRITICAL -- 36 HOURS. No breakthrough as of April 4 morning. Iran rejected peace plan. NPT exit push signals hardline. Brent at $107.

three_scenarios.strikes: Trump hits 15 Iranian power grid nodes. Oil spike above $120. New prediction market wave on escalation/de-escalation.
three_scenarios.extension: Fourth deadline extension. Markets recalibrate, another pause. Volume continues elevated.
three_scenarios.ceasefire: Surprise deal. Polymarket ceasefire-by-April-30 at 56% odds. Oil crashes, crypto recovers, midterm prediction markets accelerate.

dates.impact: All three outcomes generate prediction market volume. Strikes or ceasefire are bigger volume drivers than extension.
dates.action: Monday night watch. RESEARCH scan April 6-7 morning to update geopolitical watchlist.

dates.event: Solana Frontier Hackathon starts (runs to May 11)
dates.impact: Low direct relevance (Solana, not Base). May surface competitors.
300 curated seats. Dedicated prediction market event. 5c(c) Capital backers likely attending. LEVER's #1 fundraising opportunity.
dates.action: SECURE A SEAT IMMEDIATELY. Register at predictionmarketsconference.com. Prepare pitch deck with updated March 2026 data. Note: Kalshi CEO Tarek Mansour tweeted about hosting 'our first Prediction Market Conference' - 5c(c) Capital founders (ex-Kalshi) almost certainly attending. Shayne Coplan (Polymarket CEO) spoke at MIT Sloan in March - likely at this event too.

dates.impact: 40,000+ attendees. High visibility. Bitcoin-focused. Less directly relevant.
dates.action: Optional. Same city as Prediction Conference (combine travel).

dates.event: CFTC ANPR comment deadline (prediction market regulation)
dates.impact: Public comments close. Final rules shape what is legal prediction market infrastructure. Prediction market regulation will be the hottest topic at all April events.
dates.action: Monitor submissions for industry positioning signals

dates.event: Consensus Miami (May 5-7, Miami Beach Convention Center)
dates.impact: 20,000+ attendees. 10th anniversary. Largest Americas crypto conference. Broad VC density.
dates.action: Second priority event after Prediction Conference. Good for follow-up meetings.

dates.impact: 1 cut projected for 2026. If Iran war persists and oil stays above $100, rate hold likely. Affects crypto and DeFi liquidity.
dates.action: Monitor Fed statements for rate guidance

dates.event: 5c(c) Capital first close (within weeks of March 23 announcement)
dates.impact: First dedicated prediction market VC fund closing. LEVER pitch window narrowing.
dates.action: CEO: outreach to Adhi Rajaprabhakaran and Noah Zingler-Sternig BEFORE first close

dates.impact: New Prediction Markets Forum. Sports betting industry crossover.
dates.action: Monitor for regulatory signals on sports prediction market classification

dates.impact: Must launch before July regulatory deadlines. Q2 = April-June window.
dates.action: BUILD: target April-May for mainnet readiness

dates.impact: Unified Base DEX liquidity. LEVER should have lvUSDT/USDT pool ready.
dates.action: BUILD: coordinate timing with Aero launch for LP token liquidity

dates.impact: USDT may face EU restrictions. Only USDC is MiCA-compliant. Affects LEVER if targeting EU users.
dates.action: Low urgency for v1 (not targeting EU). Plan multi-collateral (USDC) for v2.

dates.event: GENIUS Act final rules (US stablecoin regulation)
dates.impact: Determines stablecoin compliance requirements. May affect USDT usage in US DeFi.
dates.action: Monitor for DeFi protocol obligations around stablecoin usage

dates.impact: Primary prediction market demand driver for H2 2026. Volume expected to surge 3-6 months before. Conditional markets already growing 15% WoW.
dates.action: LEVER should be live and established well before midterm volume surge

critical_path: NOW: CEO outreach to 5c(c) Capital (first close imminent)
NOW: Secure Prediction Conference seat (April 22-24, 300 seats only)
March 30: Monitor Polymarket fee expansion impact on volume
Q2: LEVER mainnet launch (before July regulatory deadlines)
